sections.heading: CNC Fiber Laser Table
sections.text: 0 Appreciate Project CNC Fiber Laser Table Hello! My name is Jay Vilhauer, and I would like to submit this CNC Fiber Laser Table project for PCBWay sponsorship. Overview This project will create a DIY FIber Laser Table, for home hobby use. The main driver for development is to use it to fabricate components for a DeLorean EV Conversion. (Sorry, no Time Machine, but it may have a Flux Capacitor. 😉) I am requesting PCBWay sponsorship of approx. $715.00 worth of CNC aluminum components. The build process will be documented on my YouTube channel, of course with promotional content and links for PCBWay services. (This is my first time documenting a project on YouTube, but not the first time crea...
